Shipped FR-PERF-002 (Lighthouse-in-CI). Investigated the advisory budget breach: Lighthouse vs the deployed site shows /en CLS 0.001, LCP 1.53s, TBT 20ms (within budget); the CI 0.33 CLS + 2.6-3.4s LCP were single-run variance against a cold next start on a contended runner (layout-shift-elements empty; 3 direct LayoutShift captures ~0.001). Fixes: numberOfRuns 3 (median), min-height on .cs-header-actions, and a scoped required gate (CLS + resource budgets = error; LCP/TTI/TBT = warn). Verified: build rc=0, vitest 37/37; median-of-3 CI run passed all error-level assertions (only LCP warned). BACKLOG 47 shipped / 1 hold / 45 planned.
